personal-portfolio.title: Portfolio Website
personal-portfolio.description: My personal portfolio where you can see my skills, cv, projects and where you can contact me! It uses HTML, Tailwind CSS & Javascript. It's got both a desktop and mobile view and features my very own styling!
features: Responsive design for all screen sizes
CV to look at my experiences

skill2-project.title: Website The Andersons
skill2-project.description: This is a website me and my teammates had to build for our Skill Integration Lab 2 course in my 2nd year at Thomas More. It uses TALL-stack to make a secure portal for a family to live their lives with. (DISCLAIMER: all data seen in the photos is mock data)
features: Multiple account types with different permissions
